examples.sentence: どうにかこの仕事を終わらせないものか。
examples.translation: Isn't there some way to finish this job?
examples.translationEn: Isnt there some way to finish this job?
examples.romaji: Dō ni ka kono shigoto o owarasenai mono ka.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Isnt there some way to finish this job?

examples.sentence: どうにか次の試験で合格しないものか。
examples.translation: Can't we somehow pass the next exam?
examples.translationEn: Cant we somehow pass the next exam?
examples.romaji: Dō ni ka tsugi no shiken de gōkaku shinai mono ka.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Cant we somehow pass the next exam?

examples.sentence: どうにか込んでいる電車に乗れないものか。
examples.translation: Is there no way to get on the crowded train somehow?
examples.translationEn: Is there no way to get on the crowded train somehow?
examples.romaji: Dō ni ka konde iru densha ni norenai mono ka.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Is there no way to get on the crowded train somehow?

examples.sentence: どうにか彼女と仲直りしないものか。
examples.translation: Isn't there some way to make up with her?
examples.translationEn: Isnt there some way to make up with her?
examples.romaji: Dō ni ka kanojo to nakanaori shinai mono ka.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Isnt there some way to make up with her?

examples.sentence: 先生が言ったとおりに宿題をしました。
examples.translation: I did my homework exactly as the teacher said.
examples.translationEn: I did my homework exactly as the teacher said
examples.romaji: Sensei ga itta tōri ni shukudai o shimashita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I did my homework exactly as the teacher said

examples.sentence: この地図のとおりに歩いてください。
examples.translation: Please walk according to this map.
examples.translationEn: Please walk according to this map
examples.romaji: Kono chizu no tōri ni aruite kudasai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Please walk according to this map

examples.sentence: 彼はいつもルールどおりに遊びます。
examples.translation: He always plays by the rules.
examples.translationEn: He always plays by the rules
examples.romaji: Kare wa itsumo rūru-dōri ni asobimasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: He always plays by the rules

examples.sentence: その道路は昼間と同じくらい夜も賑やかだというとおりでした。
examples.translation: As I heard, that street was just as lively at night as it is in the daytime.
examples.translationEn: As I heard, that street was just as lively at night as it is in the daytime
examples.romaji: Sono dōro wa hiruma to onaji kurai yoru mo nigiyaka da to iu tōri deshita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: As I heard, that street was just as lively at night as it is in the daytime

examples.sentence: 休日は映画を見るとか、買い物に行くとかして過ごします。
examples.translation: On my days off, I do things like watch movies or go shopping.
examples.translationEn: On my days off, I do things like watch movies or go shopping
examples.romaji: Kyūjitsu wa eiga o miru to ka, kaimono ni iku to ka shite sugoshimasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: On my days off, I do things like watch movies or go shopping

examples.sentence: 彼女はオーストラリアとかニュージーランドとかに行きたがっています。
examples.translation: She wants to go to places like Australia or New Zealand.
examples.translationEn: She wants to go to places like Australia or New Zealand
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa Ōsutoraria to ka Nyūjīrando to ka ni ikitagatte imasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: She wants to go to places like Australia or New Zealand

examples.sentence: 今日の天気は晴れたり、曇ったりとかだそうです。
examples.translation: I heard today’s weather is something like sunny at times, cloudy at times.
examples.translationEn: I heard today’s weather is something like sunny at times, cloudy at times
examples.romaji: Kyō no tenki wa hare tari, kumottari to ka da sō desu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I heard today’s weather is something like sunny at times, cloudy at times

examples.sentence: 彼は野球をしたり、サッカーをしたりとかしています。
examples.translation: He spends his time playing baseball and soccer and such.
examples.translationEn: He spends his time playing baseball and soccer and such
examples.romaji: Kare wa yakyū o shitari, sakkā o shitari to ka shite imasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: He spends his time playing baseball and soccer and such

examples.sentence: 出かけるところです。
examples.translation: I'm just about to go out.
examples.translationEn: Im just about to go out
examples.romaji: Dekakeru tokoro desu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Im just about to go out

examples.sentence: 映画を見ているところです。
examples.translation: I'm in the middle of watching a movie.
examples.translationEn: Im in the middle of watching a movie
examples.romaji: Eiga o mite iru tokoro desu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Im in the middle of watching a movie

examples.sentence: おいしいところで食事をするつもりです。
examples.translation: I plan to have a meal at a good (tasty) place.
examples.translationEn: I plan to have a meal at a good (tasty) place
examples.romaji: Oishii tokoro de shokuji o suru tsumori desu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I plan to have a meal at a good (tasty) place

examples.sentence: 彼は忙しいところを手伝ってくれました。
examples.translation: He helped me when he himself was busy.
examples.translationEn: He helped me when he himself was busy
examples.romaji: Kare wa isogashii tokoro o tetsudatte kuremashita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: He helped me when he himself was busy

examples.sentence: 彼は歌が上手どころか、プロの歌手みたいだ。
examples.translation: Far from just being good at singing, he sounds like a professional singer.
examples.translationEn: Far from just being good at singing, he sounds like a professional singer
examples.romaji: Kare wa uta ga jōzu dokoro ka, puro no kashu mitai da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Far from just being good at singing, he sounds like a professional singer

examples.sentence: この料理はおいしいどころか、最高の味だ。
examples.translation: This dish is not just delicious, it’s absolutely the best.
examples.translationEn: This dish is not just delicious, it’s absolutely the best
examples.romaji: Kono ryōri wa oishii dokoro ka, saikō no aji da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: This dish is not just delicious, it’s absolutely the best

examples.sentence: 彼女はただの友達どころか、私の親友だ。
examples.translation: She’s far from just a friend; she’s my best friend.
examples.translationEn: She’s far from just a friend; she’s my best friend
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa tada no tomodachi dokoro ka, watashi no shin’yū da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: She’s far from just a friend; she’s my best friend

examples.sentence: 彼は英語ができるどころか、他の3つの言語も話せる。
examples.translation: Not only can he speak English, he also speaks three other languages.
examples.translationEn: Not only can he speak English, he also speaks three other languages
examples.romaji: Kare wa eigo ga dekiru dokoro ka, hoka no mittsu no gengo mo hanaseru.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Not only can he speak English, he also speaks three other languages

examples.sentence: 彼の失敗を笑うどころではない。私たちも同じミスをしている。
examples.translation: This is not the time to laugh at his mistakes—we’re making the same ones.
examples.translationEn: This is not the time to laugh at his mistakes—we’re making the same ones
examples.romaji: Kare no shippai o warau dokoro de wa nai. Watashitachi mo onaji misu o shite iru.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: This is not the time to laugh at his mistakes—we’re making the same ones

examples.sentence: 病気で寝ている時は、遊ぶどころではない。
examples.translation: When you’re sick in bed, it's far from the time to play around.
examples.translationEn: When you’re sick in bed, its far from the time to play around
examples.romaji: Byōki de nete iru toki wa, asobu dokoro de wa nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: When you’re sick in bed, its far from the time to play around

examples.sentence: 試験が近いので、映画を見るどころではない。
examples.translation: Since the exam is coming up, I can’t possibly watch a movie.
examples.translationEn: Since the exam is coming up, I can’t possibly watch a movie
examples.romaji: Shiken ga chikai node, eiga o miru dokoro de wa nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Since the exam is coming up, I can’t possibly watch a movie

examples.sentence: 仕事が忙しすぎて、旅行なんて考えるどころではない。
examples.translation: I'm way too busy with work to even think about going on a trip.
examples.translationEn: Im way too busy with work to even think about going on a trip
examples.romaji: Shigoto ga isogashisugite, ryokō nante kangaeru dokoro de wa nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Im way too busy with work to even think about going on a trip

examples.sentence: 明日雨が降るとしたら、傘を持っていきましょう。
examples.translation: If it rains tomorrow, let’s bring umbrellas.
examples.translationEn: If it rains tomorrow, let’s bring umbrellas
examples.romaji: Ashita ame ga furu to shitara, kasa o motte ikimashō.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If it rains tomorrow, let’s bring umbrellas

examples.sentence: このケーキが美味しくないとしたら、誰も食べないだろう。
examples.translation: If this cake isn’t tasty, probably no one will eat it.
examples.translationEn: If this cake isn’t tasty, probably no one will eat it
examples.romaji: Kono kēki ga oishikunai to shitara, dare mo tabenai darō.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If this cake isn’t tasty, probably no one will eat it

examples.sentence: 彼が病気だとしたら、早めに病院へ行かないといけません。
examples.translation: If he is sick, he needs to go to the hospital soon.
examples.translationEn: If he is sick, he needs to go to the hospital soon
examples.romaji: Kare ga byōki da to shitara, hayame ni byōin e ikanai to ikemasen.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If he is sick, he needs to go to the hospital soon

examples.sentence: 彼女が学生だとしたら、このレストランは割引があるでしょう。
examples.translation: If she’s a student, there’s probably a discount at this restaurant.
examples.translationEn: If she’s a student, there’s probably a discount at this restaurant
examples.romaji: Kanojo ga gakusei da to shitara, kono resutoran wa waribiki ga aru deshō.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If she’s a student, there’s probably a discount at this restaurant

examples.sentence: 雨が降るとしても、レースは中止しません。
examples.translation: Even if it rains, we won't cancel the race.
examples.translationEn: Even if it rains, we wont cancel the race
examples.romaji: Ame ga furu to shite mo, rēsu wa chūshi shimasen.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Even if it rains, we wont cancel the race

examples.sentence: このケーキが美味しくないとしても、私は食べるつもりです。
examples.translation: Even if this cake isn't delicious, I plan on eating it.
examples.translationEn: Even if this cake isnt delicious, I plan on eating it
examples.romaji: Kono kēki ga oishikunai to shite mo, watashi wa taberu tsumori desu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Even if this cake isnt delicious, I plan on eating it

examples.sentence: 彼女が遅刻するとしても、私たちは待ち続けます。
examples.translation: Even if she is late, we will keep waiting.
examples.translationEn: Even if she is late, we will keep waiting
examples.romaji: Kanojo ga chikoku suru to shite mo, watashitachi wa machitsuzukemasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Even if she is late, we will keep waiting

examples.sentence: 忙しいだとしても、友達との約束は守りたい。
examples.translation: Even if I'm busy, I want to keep my promise to my friend.
examples.translationEn: Even if Im busy, I want to keep my promise to my friend
examples.romaji: Isogashii da to shite mo, tomodachi to no yakusoku wa mamoritai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Even if Im busy, I want to keep my promise to my friend
